result.name: Mindshield helmet
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Lightweight cloth, leather, or metal helmet Effect: The wearer gains 3 Armor that protects against Intellect damage only. Further, attempts to affect the wearer’s mind are hindered (or hindered by two steps if the artifact is level 7 or higher). Depletion: —

sections.name: Mindshield helmet

Level: 1d6 + 2

Form: Lightweight cloth, leather, or metal helmet

Effect: The wearer gains 3 Armor that protects against Intellect damage only. Further, attempts to affect the wearer’s mind are hindered (or hindered by two steps if the artifact is level 7 or higher).

Depletion: —
